summary.zh: 这里是属于斗气的世界，没有花俏艳丽的魔法，有的，仅仅是繁衍到巅峰的斗气！
summary.en: In a world where the strong make the rules and the weak are enslaved, a young man named Xiao Yan works to restore his family's honor.

summary.zh: 一粒尘可填海，一根草斩尽日月星辰。少年石昊从大荒中走出，踏上了征战诸天的道路。
summary.en: A speck of dust can fill the sea, a blade of grass can cut down stars. Young Shi Hao walks out of the wilderness to conquer the heavens.

summary.zh: 大陆上传说中的四大终极战士，林雷无意中得到了传说中的盘龙戒指，走上了强者之路。
summary.en: Linley unexpectedly obtains the legendary Coiling Dragon ring and embarks on the path to becoming one of the continent's ultimate warriors.

summary.zh: 冰冷与黑暗并存的宇宙深处，九具庞大的龙尸拉着一口青铜古棺，亘古长存。叶凡踏上星空古路，揭开遮天秘密。
summary.en: In the cold darkness of deep space, nine huge dragon corpses pull an ancient bronze coffin. Ye Fan embarks on a starry road to uncover the secrets that shroud the heavens.

summary.zh: 少年林动偶然获得神秘石符，从此踏上武学之路，在武道之途上不断突破自我。
summary.en: Young Lin Dong accidentally obtains a mysterious stone talisman, embarking on a martial arts journey of constant self-breakthrough.

summary.zh: 少年牧尘自北灵境而出，骑九幽冥雀，闯向那精彩绝伦的大千世界。
summary.en: Young Mu Chen emerges from the Northern Spirit Realm, riding the Netherworld Sparrow into the boundless and magnificent Greater World.

summary.zh: 大墟的祖训说，天黑别出门。残老村的老头们抚养秦牧长大，教给他颠覆世界的知识。
summary.en: The ancestors said: don't go out after dark. The elders of the Crippled Village raise Qin Mu, teaching him knowledge that will overturn the world.

summary.zh: 神魔陵园中，万古以来埋葬了无数神魔。辰南从墓地中复活走出，探寻万古的真相。
summary.en: In the Divine Demon Cemetery, countless gods and demons have been buried for eons. Chen Nan rises from his grave to uncover the truth of eternity.

summary.zh: 被家族遗弃的少年，凭借体内的九色神雷，逆天改命，成就武神之路。
summary.en: Abandoned by his clan, a young boy relies on the nine-colored divine thunder within him to defy fate and walk the path of a martial god.

author.en: Beacon Fires Play with the Vassals

summary.zh: 大千世界，无奇不有。少年陈平安带着一身木剑，走出小镇，踏上浩浩荡荡的修行之路。
summary.en: A world of wonders. Young Chen Ping'an carries his wooden sword out of a small town and embarks on a magnificent cultivation journey.

summary.zh: 一个身世神秘的年轻人范闲，在家族、江湖、庙堂的纷争中逐渐成长，书写了一段传奇人生。
summary.en: A young man with a mysterious background grows up amidst the conflicts of family, martial arts world, and imperial court, writing a legendary life.

title.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

summary.zh: 一个普通的山村少年，偶然踏入修仙之门，从此走上了一条坎坷漫长的修仙之路。
summary.en: An ordinary village youth accidentally stumbles onto the path of immortality, beginning a long and arduous cultivation journey.

summary.zh: 我命如妖欲封天！少年孟浩踏入修仙之路，以逆天之姿走向封天之路。
summary.en: My fate is like a demon, I shall seal the heavens! Meng Hao walks the path of immortality, defying heaven itself.

summary.zh: 一念化沧海，一念化桑田。少年白小纯为追求长生踏入修仙界，搞笑又热血的修行之旅。
summary.en: A thought becomes the ocean, a thought becomes the fields. Bai Xiaochun enters the cultivation world seeking immortality, in a hilarious yet thrilling journey.

summary.zh: 顺为凡，逆则仙，只在心中一念间。少年王林崛起于微末，以逆天之力走上修仙巅峰。
summary.en: To follow is mortal, to rebel is immortal — it's all in a single thought. Wang Lin rises from obscurity to the peak of immortality through defiance.

summary.zh: 命运，已将我抛弃；而我，却凌驾于命运之上！苏铭踏上了一条充满悲伤与希望的求魔之路。
summary.en: Fate has abandoned me, yet I rise above fate itself! Su Ming embarks on a path of sorrow and hope — the path of seeking the devil.

summary.zh: 前世的魏无羡万人唾骂，重生后与旧识蓝忘机携手探寻谜团背后的真相。
summary.en: Reviled by the world in his past life, Wei Wuxian reunites with Lan Wangji to uncover the truth behind a series of mysteries.

summary.zh: 八百年前，谢怜是仙界最耀眼的太子殿下。八百年后，他三度飞升，成为最落魄的天官。
summary.en: Eight hundred years ago, Xie Lian was the most brilliant prince of the heavenly realm. After three ascensions, he becomes the most destitute heavenly official.

title.en: The Daily Life of the Immortal King

summary.zh: 拥有仙王实力的少年只想平凡度过学生时代，但他的日常生活注定不平凡。
summary.en: A teenager with the power of an immortal king just wants a normal student life — but his daily life is anything but ordinary.

summary.zh: 青山宗的小师叔景阳真人，修行天赋冠绝古今，却因一场意外而步入轮回转世。
summary.en: The youngest grand-uncle of Green Mountain Sect, Jing Yang, possesses unparalleled talent — until an accident sends him into reincarnation.

summary.zh: 纪宁因为一场意外穿越到莽荒世界，成为部落少年，凭借剑道天赋崛起于天地之间。
summary.en: Ji Ning is transported to a primordial world where he rises through his sword talent, transforming from a tribal youth into a legendary figure.

summary.zh: 一个平凡的现代人穿越到修仙世界，凭借紫府之资，一步一步踏上修仙大道。
summary.en: An ordinary modern man is transported to a cultivation world where he slowly walks the immortal path with his purple mansion talent.

summary.zh: 网游荣耀中被誉为斗神的叶修被俱乐部驱逐，转身成为网吧网管，重返荣耀巅峰。
summary.en: Ye Xiu, the Battle God of Glory, is expelled from his club and becomes an internet café manager, fighting his way back to the top.

summary.zh: 未来世界，人类通过基因核来进化。韩森获得超级神基因系统，踏上成神之路。
summary.en: In a future where humans evolve through gene nuclei, Han Sen obtains the Super Gene system and walks the path to godhood.

summary.zh: 神秘高手林逸奉师命下山保护校花，从此卷入了一系列纷繁复杂的事件中。
summary.en: A mysterious master, Lin Yi, is ordered by his master to protect a campus belle, getting drawn into a series of complex events.

summary.zh: 被家族抛弃的少年叶默，偶得炼丹传承，从弃少逆袭成为一代传奇。
summary.en: Abandoned by his family, Ye Mo accidentally obtains an alchemy inheritance, rising from a discarded son to a legend.

title.en: My Wife is a Beautiful CEO

summary.zh: 一名商业精英穿越到古代成为赘婿，凭借现代商业智慧，在乱世中创造商业帝国。
summary.en: A business精英 travels back in time, becoming a live-in son-in-law who uses modern business wisdom to build an empire in a chaotic era.

title.en: Rebirth of the Urban Immortal Cultivator

summary.zh: 渡劫期修仙者洛尘渡劫失败，重生回到地球少年时代，在今世重走修仙之路。
summary.en: An immortal cultivator fails his tribulation and is reborn as a teenager on Earth, walking the path of cultivation in a modern world.

summary.zh: 一位年轻医生凭借精湛的医术和过人的智慧，在官场与医道之间游刃有余。
summary.en: A young doctor navigates both the medical world and officialdom with exceptional skill and wisdom.

summary.zh: 典当行小职员庄睿在一次意外中眼部受伤，觉醒了一双能看穿万物的黄金瞳。
summary.en: A pawn shop employee awakens golden eyes after an accident, gaining the ability to see through anything.

summary.zh: 一觉醒来，世界变了。张烨穿越到平行世界，凭借另一个世界的文娱作品成为大明星。
summary.en: Zhang Ye wakes up in a parallel world, using cultural works from his original world to become a superstar.

summary.zh: 文化大革命末期，军方探寻外星文明的绝密计划「红岸工程」取得了突破性进展。
summary.en: During the Cultural Revolution, a secret military project called Red Coast makes a breakthrough in contacting extraterrestrial civilization.

summary.zh: 大涅槃时期后，地球发生了巨变。少年罗峰崛起于微末，在星际中闯出一片天地。
summary.en: After the Great Nirvana period, Earth has transformed. Luo Feng rises from obscurity, making his name across the stars.

summary.zh: 星际时代，人类走出地球进入宇宙大时代，楚风在星空中崛起，探寻宇宙最深处的秘密。
summary.en: In the interstellar era, humanity steps into the cosmos. Chu Feng rises among the stars, seeking the deepest secrets of the universe.

summary.zh: 郑吒进入了一个名为「主神空间」的神秘空间，穿梭于各个恐怖片世界完成任务。
summary.en: Zheng Zha enters a mysterious space called the 'God's Domain', traveling through horror movie worlds to complete missions.

summary.zh: 末日降临，世界陷入混乱。一个神秘的轮盘系统出现，只有通过轮盘赌命的人才能获得生存资格。
summary.en: The apocalypse descends, plunging the world into chaos. A mysterious roulette system appears — only those who gamble with their lives can survive.

summary.zh: 人类终于实现了星际航行，却发现宇宙中充满了远超想象的文明和危机。
summary.en: Humanity finally achieves interstellar travel, only to discover a universe filled with civilizations and dangers beyond imagination.

title.en: The Black Technology System of a Top Student

summary.zh: 意外绑定了黑科技系统，陆舟从一个普通大学生成长为引领人类科技变革的科学家。
summary.en: Accidentally bound to a black technology system, Lu Zhou grows from an ordinary student to a scientist leading humanity's technological revolution.

title.en: Learning to Kill Gods in a Mental Hospital

summary.zh: 林七夜在精神病院中觉醒异能，发现这个世界远比他想象的更加危险和神秘。
summary.en: Lin Qiyue awakens supernatural abilities in a mental hospital, discovering the world is far more dangerous and mysterious than he ever imagined.

summary.zh: 高文穿越到异世界，用科学思维和现代知识，带领落后的文明走向黎明。
summary.en: Gawain travels to a different world, using scientific thinking and modern knowledge to lead a backward civilization toward the dawn.

summary.zh: 系花贝微微在游戏中意外嫁给了全服第一高手，一段从线上到线下的甜蜜爱情就此展开。
summary.en: University beauty Bei Weiwei unexpectedly marries the top player in an online game, beginning a sweet romance bridging the virtual and real worlds.

summary.zh: 一段年少时的爱恋，牵出一生的纠缠。七年分离后，何以琛与赵默笙再度重逢。
summary.en: A youthful romance leads to a lifetime of entanglements. After seven years apart, He Yichen and Zhao Mosheng reunite.

summary.zh: 花千骨是一个命格诡异的孤女，拜入长留上仙白子画门下，一段旷世之恋就此展开。
summary.en: Hua Qiangu, an orphan with a bizarre fate, becomes the disciple of immortal master Bai Zihua, beginning an epic love story.

title.en: Three Lives Three Worlds Ten Miles Peach Blossoms

summary.zh: 青丘帝姬白浅与天族太子夜华历经三生三世的爱恨纠葛，终成眷属。
summary.en: The green hill princess Bai Qian and the heavenly prince Ye Hua experience love and heartbreak across three lifetimes.

summary.zh: 花神之女锦觅与天帝之子旭凤三世轮回的恩怨痴缠，守望千年的爱情故事。
summary.en: The flower goddess's daughter Jin Mi and the heavenly emperor's son Xu Feng are entangled across three lifetimes in a love story spanning millennia.

title.zh: 知否知否应是绿肥红瘦

summary.zh: 现代法律系学生姚依依穿越到古代成为庶女盛明兰，在宅斗和权谋中守护自己与所爱之人。
summary.en: A modern law student travels back in time as Shen Minglan, navigating palace intrigue and family politics to protect herself and those she loves.

summary.zh: 十二年前一场大火烧尽了赤焰军的荣耀。梅长苏以病弱之躯重返帝都，掀起滔天权谋风暴。
summary.en: A fire twelve years ago destroyed the honor of the Chiyan Army. Mei Changsu returns to the capital with a frail body, unleashing a storm of political intrigue.

summary.zh: 孟扶摇为破解身上封印而踏上五洲历险之路，与长孙无极在并肩作战中互生情愫。
summary.en: Meng Fuyao embarks on a journey across five continents to break the seal on her body, falling in love with Zhangsun Wuji along the way.

title.en: Poetry and Wine: A Time Travel Romance

summary.zh: 现代白领穿越到古代书香世家，凭借一手现代诗歌和经商头脑，在古代理出一片天地。
summary.en: A modern office worker travels to an ancient scholarly family, using her knowledge of poetry and business to make her way.

summary.zh: 温衡和言希从年少到成年的十年爱情长跑，历经分离与重逢，终于守得云开见月明。
summary.en: Wen Heng and Yan Xi's ten-year love story from youth to adulthood, through separation and reunion, finally finding their happy ending.

summary.zh: 穿越到异世界的克莱恩凭借一本神秘笔记本，在诡秘与危险并存的维多利亚风世界中探索超凡之路。
summary.en: Transported to a different world, Klein relies on a mysterious notebook to explore the extraordinary path in a Victorian-style world full of secrets.

summary.zh: 继承了一家濒临倒闭的恐怖屋后，陈歌发现这座鬼屋似乎真的有鬼，而且不止一个。
summary.en: After inheriting a failing haunted house, Chen Ge discovers it actually has real ghosts — and more than one.

summary.zh: 五十年前的一具战国古尸引出了一场横跨中国各地的盗墓冒险，吴邪与张起灵踏上了寻秘之旅。
summary.en: A fifty-year-old Warring States corpse triggers a treasure-hunting adventure across China, as Wu Xie and Zhang Qiling seek the truth.

summary.zh: 胡八一凭借一本家传的《十六字阴阳风水秘术》残卷，与好友一同踏上了惊心动魄的盗墓之旅。
summary.en: Hu Bayi relies on a fragment of a family heirloom feng shui manual to embark on a heart-pounding grave-robbing adventure with his friends.

summary.zh: 林秋石被卷入一个充满恐怖谜题的神秘世界，只有通过十二扇门的人才能回到现实。
summary.en: Lin Qiushi is pulled into a mysterious world of terrifying puzzles — only those who pass through twelve doors can return to reality.

summary.zh: 一座神秘的公寓里住着一群被诅咒的人，他们必须完成公寓下达的各种恐怖任务才能活下去。
summary.en: A mysterious apartment houses a group of cursed people who must complete terrifying tasks assigned by the apartment to survive.

summary.zh: 全球性的一场诡异考试降临，游惑被卷入其中，与神秘考官秦究在生死考验中并肩作战。
summary.en: A mysterious global examination descends upon the world. You Huo is drawn into it, fighting alongside the enigmatic examiner Qin Jiu.

summary.zh: 方休每晚都会进入同一个噩梦世界，在梦中被各种恐怖存在追杀。当他在梦中死去，现实也将终结。
summary.en: Fang Xiu enters the same nightmare world every night, hunted by terrifying beings. When he dies in the dream, reality ends too.

summary.zh: 苗疆少年陆左意外获得巫蛊传承，从此卷入一系列诡异离奇的事件中。
summary.en: A Miao Jiang youth accidentally inherits a voodoo legacy, getting drawn into a series of bizarre and uncanny events.

summary.zh: 一个中国留学生在泰国意外进入佛牌行业，见识了各种诡异离奇的灵异事件。
summary.en: A Chinese student in Thailand accidentally enters the amulet business, witnessing all kinds of bizarre supernatural incidents.
